problem.title: Tour business still runs on chaos
problem.subtitle: Excel spreadsheets, endless WhatsApp threads, lost bookings, manual invoicing. The Central Asian tourism industry deserves better tools.

card.title: Built by tourism experts, for tourism professionals
paragraphs: We talked to operators in Tashkent, Bukhara and Samarkand. We watched them juggle 6 different tools to assemble a single 3-day tour. We saw agencies lose bookings because confirmations came 2 days late.
TourLink replaces all of it with one platform — purpose-built for the region.

visual.chaosLabel: Too many tools for one tour
visual.beforeSummary: Excel, messengers, email and calls — every step in a different app
visual.solutionHeadline: Build a tour in one window
visual.solutionSubtitle: Constructor, bookings and documents — no switching between services
visual.resolution: TourLink replaces all this chaos with one platform
benefits: Hotel, transfer and activities in one builder

audience.title: One platform, two complete toolkits
audience.subtitle: Whether you build tours or sell them, we've designed the workflow around how your team actually works.

operator.title: Build tours visually. Sell them everywhere.

roadmap.title: Building the future of Central Asian tourism
roadmap.subtitle: Four phases from operational tool to industry operating system.

steps.title: B2B Operations
steps.tagline: Tour builder, bookings, CRM, documents, analytics

steps.title: AI & Automation
steps.tagline: Smart bookings, AI responses, external integrations

steps.title: Industry OS
steps.tagline: TOS-level platform — infrastructure for the region

phases.description: Everything an operator or agency needs to run day-to-day: build tours visually, take bookings, send documents, manage clients and see the numbers.
bullets: Visual tour constructor with drag-and-drop components
Client CRM, finance and reporting in one place

phases.description: Smart booking flows that pre-fill themselves. AI-powered responses to client inquiries in three languages. Connections to external systems your business already uses.
bullets: AI assistant for client conversations and quotes
Smart booking flows — recommend, price, confirm automatically

phases.description: Direct integration with hotel SRMs, transfer companies, restaurants and attractions. Auto-confirmation of availability. Full reconciliation of every tour component.
bullets: Direct API to hotel SRM systems across Central Asia
Real-time reconciliation between operators and suppliers
Suppliers join free — they get tools, you get inventory

phases.description: A TOS-level platform — the standard infrastructure layer that every Central Asian tour business runs on. From booking to billing to government reporting, all in one stack.
bullets: Public API used by everyone in tourism — like Stripe for payments
Cross-border tours across Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan
Direct integration with government reporting and tax authorities
App marketplace — third-party tools building on TourLink

ai.userMessage: Hi! What documents are needed for the "Silk Road · 3 days" tour?
ai.botMessage: Hello! You'll need a passport valid for at least 6 months and a visa if you're not from CIS countries. I've prepared a draft reply with all details — send it?

controls.hint: Click any phase to focus on it

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: From sign-up to your first booking — three simple steps.

steps.title: Pick your role
steps.desc: Sign up as an operator to build and sell tours, or as an agency to discover and book them. Quick verification gets you live within 24 hours.

steps.title: Set up your profile
steps.desc: Operators: connect your supplier network and create your first tour. Agencies: browse the catalog and customize your commission settings.

steps.title: Start transacting
steps.desc: Operators receive bookings in real-time. Agencies confirm tours with one click. Invoices, vouchers and payments handled automatically.

testimonials.title: Industry voices
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from operators and agencies in our private beta.

items.quote: Building a 3-day Silk Road tour used to take us a full day in Word and Excel. Now it takes 20 minutes, and the output looks ten times better than what we used to send clients.
items.name: Aziz Rakhimov

items.quote: Before TourLink we lost two bookings a month because we couldn't confirm availability fast enough. The live catalog and instant booking changed that completely.
items.name: Elena Kim

items.quote: The downloadable PDF previews are gorgeous — my clients sign off on the itinerary in one call instead of three. Game changer for closing private group tours.
items.name: Jamshid Aliev

cta.title: Ready to grow your tour business?
cta.subtitle: Join Central Asia's first B2B tour platform. Free during our public beta. Set up in minutes.
